data.body:
TARGETS (confirmed by 3 parallel Explore agents; rebar-owned flags only).

NEW FILE:
- src/rebar/_engine/ticket-output.sh — shared sourced helper: _match_output_flag <arg> <next> <allowed> (sets _OUTPUT_FMT/_OUTPUT_CONSUMED_NEXT; returns 0 match / 1 not-output-flag / 2 invalid) + _validate_output_format. Accepts -o V, -o=V, --output V, --output=V. Replaces the ~6 duplicated --format=* case arms + bespoke "unsupported format" strings.

CHANGE — engine (rebar's own flag):
- rebar (dispatcher) usage strings: lines 20,59,88,89,107,114,129
- ticket-lib-api.sh (show arm + list arm): 164,166,177,184,222,231,234,235,322,388,391,392,420,432
- ticket-show.sh: 5,9,11,60,73,76,77
- ticket-list.sh: 5,13,60,63,64,92,93,108
- ticket-bridge-status.sh: 5,6,43,52,55,56  (--format=json -> --output json)
- validate-issues.sh: 14,49,70,77  (--json -> --output json)
- ticket-next-batch.sh: 19,119,128,143  (--json -> --output json)
- ticket-ready.py: argparse --output/-o choices [ids,llm,json]; drop --json + --format; lines 10,17,18,20,21,76-86,114-124
- ticket_reducer/_present.py:8, _filters.py:5 (docstring mentions only)

CHANGE — library:
- src/rebar/__init__.py:206 validate ["validate","--json"] -> ["validate","--output","json"]
- src/rebar/__init__.py:329 next-batch [...,"--json"] -> [...,"--output","json"]
- src/rebar/_reads.py:131 docstring mention

INTERNAL-SELF-CALL (rebar calling rebar; MUST update):
- rebar_reconciler/check-obligations.sh:49  ticket list ... --format=llm -> --output llm

CHANGE — tests (update invocations + assertions + docstrings):
- tests/interfaces/adapters.py:176,179
- tests/interfaces/test_cli.py:133
- tests/interfaces/test_native_read_parity.py:177,188,212
- tests/interfaces/test_reducer_single_source.py:4,109,114,116
- tests/scripts/test_bridge_status.py:8,24,254,261,280,283,291
- tests/scripts/test-ticket-list-filters.sh:96,124,191,193,202,203
- tests/scripts/test-ticket-list-parent-alias.sh:163,171
- tests/scripts/test-ticket-list-status-comma-or.sh:83
- tests/scripts/test-ticket-list.sh:386,387,412,415,483,484,508,510,572,573,588,594
- tests/scripts/test-ticket-next-batch-dispatcher.sh:190,192,195,216,219
- tests/scripts/test-ticket-ready-dispatcher.sh:283-309,334-358
- tests/scripts/test-ticket-show-inbound.sh:110
- tests/scripts/test-ticket-show.sh:201-321,681-706
- tests/scripts/test-ticket-validate.sh:6,265,266,272,279,282
RENAME: tests/interfaces/test_ready_json.py -> test_ready_output.py (whole file is about ready --json)

CHANGE — docs:
- README.md:204 (rebar's own --json in prose)

EXCLUDE (external CLIs — do NOT touch):
- acli-integration.py (all --json: acli/jira); rebar_reconciler/probe_gap*.sh (acli); _attestation.py:128, applier.py:183, ticket-fsck-recover.sh:213/236/249 (git log --format); docs/releasing.md:48 (gh run list --json); tests/.../test_outbound_differ_live_comment_fetch.py:4 (acli); tests/scripts/test-push-tickets-dirty-wd-recovery.sh:154 (git log --format).
